Our Heritage

Masters of Marble Craft

We are Unique White Marble And Art — a premium marble studio from Makrana, Rajasthan. The same Makrana marble as the Taj Mahal flows through our creations.

For 12+ years, our artisans craft exquisite marble mandirs, water fountains & art pieces. Factory direct — no middlemen, maximum value.

Makrana Marble
Same stone as the Taj Mahal — purest grade
100% Handmade
Master artisans with generational expertise
Custom Designs
Your vision, our craft — perfect execution
Pan India Delivery
Safe, insured delivery across all of India
